mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 in the positive direction over a 3-year rolling window, or forward returns are statistically indistinguishable from zero during rate hikes.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.3 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing consumer spending expectations and triggering negative equity returns within 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in 70% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power with p > 0.10 in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based demand growth, boosting corporate revenue forecasts and driving positive S&P 500 returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in more than 55% of occurrences, or interaction term coefficient is insignificant with p > 0.05 in regression tests.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly acceleration in industrial production indicates rapid capacity utilization and supply-side momentum, generating positive short-term equity returns during post-recession recovery phases.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses to negative during recovery periods, or 5-day forward returns show no statistical edge with t-stat < 1.5 in the specified regime.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI increase above 2.5% triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity multiples and producing negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity markets rally in 65% of high-inflation months, or the threshold fails to separate return distributions with KS test p > 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects economic resilience and wage growth, supporting corporate profit margins and yielding positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below -0.02 over rolling 3-year windows, or payroll growth correlates negatively with forward returns in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent rises in housing starts and retail sales indicate synchronized consumer and capital expenditure strength, amplifying earnings revisions and driving positive monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: The interaction effect vanishes with coefficient p > 0.10 or forward returns turn negative in 60% of co-occurring upswings.

mechanism_narrative: Elevated industrial production combined with rising federal funds rates signals supply constraints meeting monetary tightening, triggering negative short-term equity returns during late-cycle phases.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in 70% of triggered cases, or the joint signal fails to predict direction with accuracy above 55% in walk-forward validation.
